title: The Science of Happiness
subtitle: 科学告诉我们如何获得真正的幸福

paragraphs.en: Positive psychology has transformed happiness from a philosophical concept into a scientific research field. Researchers now measure wellbeing systematically, identifying factors that consistently correlate with life satisfaction. Their findings often contradict intuitive assumptions about what makes humans flourish.
paragraphs.zh: 积极心理学已将幸福从一个哲学概念转变为一个科学研究领域。研究人员现在系统地衡量幸福感，识别与生活满意度持续相关的因素。他们的发现常常与关于什么让人类繁荣的直觉假设相矛盾。

paragraphs.en: Money contributes to happiness, but only to a point. Research shows that income increases wellbeing until basic needs are comfortably met, after which additional wealth provides diminishing returns. Beyond moderate comfort, experiences and relationships contribute more to lasting happiness than material possessions.
paragraphs.zh: 金钱对幸福有贡献，但只是到一定程度。研究表明，收入会提高幸福感，直到基本需求得到舒适地满足，之后额外的财富提供的回报递减。超出适度的舒适之后，体验和关系比物质财产对持久幸福的贡献更大。

paragraphs.en: Social connections emerge as the strongest predictor of happiness across cultures. People with strong relationships—whether with family, friends, or community—consistently report higher life satisfaction. Loneliness, conversely, damages wellbeing as severely as physical health risks like smoking or obesity.
paragraphs.zh: 社会联系是跨文化幸福感最强的预测因素。拥有牢固关系的人——无论是与家人、朋友还是社区——始终报告更高的生活满意度。相反，孤独对幸福的损害与吸烟或肥胖等身体健康风险一样严重。

paragraphs.en: Gratitude practices demonstrate measurable impacts on happiness. Regularly acknowledging good things in life—through journaling or simply reflection—shifts attention toward positive aspects often taken for granted. This simple intervention reliably increases wellbeing across diverse populations and circumstances.
paragraphs.zh: 感恩实践展示了对幸福可衡量的影响。定期承认生活中的美好事物——通过写日记或简单的反思——将注意力转移到经常被认为理所当然的积极方面。这种简单的干预在不同人群和环境中可靠地提高了幸福感。

paragraphs.en: Purpose and meaning contribute essential dimensions to happiness beyond momentary pleasure. People engaged in activities aligned with their values—whether through work, volunteering, or creative pursuits—report deeper satisfaction. This suggests that authentic happiness requires not just feeling good but doing good and living meaningfully.
paragraphs.zh: 目标和意义为幸福贡献了超越瞬间快乐的基本维度。从事与自己价值观一致的活动的人——无论是通过工作、志愿服务还是创造性追求——报告更深层的满足感。这表明真正的幸福不仅需要感觉良好，还需要做好事和有意义地生活。
